Eol Prou

Nebula / Sector · First seen 3302-12-01 · 6 mentions
Active: 3302-12-01 → 3307-01-14
Region Overview

First mentioned: 3302-12-01
Last mentioned: 3307-01-14
Total mentions: 6

Related

  • [[Jaques Station]] (3 co-mentions)
  • [[Colonia Co-operative]] (2 co-mentions)
  • [[Colonia Council]] (1 co-mentions)
  • [[Eol Prou RS-T d3-94]] (1 co-mentions)
  • [[Deep Recon X]] (1 co-mentions)

Description

Eol Prou is a region within the Colonia Nebula that serves as a key colonisation and research zone on the galactic frontier. The area contains multiple systems designated for expansion by the Colonia Council, including sites for experimental habitats established by the Holloway Bioscience Institute to study vacuum-dwelling lifeforms.

In 3307, the Holloway Bioscience Institute selected several Eol Prou systems — including Eol Prou PC-K c9-221, Eol Prou LW-L c8-99 and Eol Prou KW-L c8-301 — as locations for experimental xenobiological habitats. These installations represent the cutting edge of frontier science, leveraging Colonia's remote location to conduct research that would be politically or logistically impossible in the Core Systems. Eol Prou exemplifies how the Colonia region has evolved from a remote outpost into a thriving scientific and colonisation hub.

Mentions Timeline (6 articles)
3307-01-14
Xenological Samples Delivered to Colonia
*Pilots Federation ALERT* The Holloway Bioscience Institute has rewarded pilots who delivered living matter extracted from space-dwelling organisms.
3303-06-04
Freelance Report Mercury Seven Expedition Returns
The Mercury Seven expedition returns to Colonia after 96 days of deep-space exploration, with discoveries in the Orio-Persean Conflux, Wagar's Reach, and Ishtar.
3303-04-21
Galactic News Colonia Resource Drive Concludes
The Colonia Co-operative resource drive concluded successfully, with thousands of tonnes of resources delivered to Jaques Station for infrastructure development.
3303-04-14
Community Goal Colonia Resource Drive
The Colonia Co-operative has placed an open order for mined Gallite, Gold, and Methanol Monohydrate Crystals to develop infrastructure throughout Colonia and surrounding systems.
3302-12-09
Freelance Report Pilot Completes Extensive Survey
Commander MissingSea of the Deep Recon X team has completed an extensive survey of the Eol Prou GG-X d1 sub-sector near Colonia, discovering hundreds of new systems and identifying terraforming candidates.
3302-12-01
Community Goal The Colonia Expansion
The Colonia Council has announced a series of monthly colonisation appeals in the Colonia Nebula, asking pilots to deliver commodities to Jaques Station so competing factions can earn the right to settle surrounding systems.
